title: realloc Semantics and Transactional Growth · Memory Trace: Growth Factor Budget
summary: A dynamic event list grows under memory pressure and loses its only pointer when resizing fails. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem growth factor budget increment in amortized vector with failure invariants. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose bounded geometric growth from amortized cost, overflow, maximum capacity, and memory-pressure evidence.
Invalidate or rebase all interior pointers and aliases when realloc may move storage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Growth Factor Budget · Theory Growth Factor Budget

steps.instruction:
